backup_source.description: Details about the backup source used for cluster restoration

continuous_backup_info.description: Information about continuous backup configurations and status

effective_annotations.description: Annotations applied to the cluster, including inherited ones

effective_labels.description: Effective labels assigned to the cluster for organization and filtering

encryption_info.description: Encryption details for data protection in the cluster

id.description: Unique identifier for the AlloyDB cluster resource

migration_source.description: Details about the source of migration for the cluster, if applicable

name.description: Fully qualified name of the AlloyDB cluster

reconciling.description: Indicates if the cluster is undergoing reconciliation

state.description: Current operational state of the AlloyDB cluster

terraform_labels.description: Labels defined in Terraform for resource management

trial_metadata.description: Metadata related to trial usage of the AlloyDB cluster

uid.description: Globally unique identifier for the AlloyDB cluster
